diagrams.title: Environment Variable Inheritance
diagrams.description: Shows how environment variables flow from parent process to child processes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding variable scope and inheritance in processes

diagrams.title: PATH Variable Search Order
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how shell searches directories in PATH when executing a command
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how PATH affects command execution and resolution

diagrams.title: Shell Initialization Sequence
diagrams.description: Flow chart showing order of shell configuration file execution
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where to place environment variable configurations

diagrams.title: Environment vs Shell Variables Venn Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between shell variables and environment variables
elements: Non-exported shell vars only in Shell circle
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the difference and relationship between variable types
